THE PROBLEM

The system is rigged against you.

Hospitals charge whatever they want. Insurance companies deny valid claims. Nobody explains anything.

💸
Inflated charges
Hospitals charge 10x the actual cost. A $15 aspirin becomes $150. A $200 test becomes $4,000.
🤯
Confusing codes
CPT codes, ICD codes, modifiers. Medical bills are designed to be unreadable so you give up.
🚫
Denied claims
Insurance companies deny 1 in 7 claims. Most patients never appeal — they just pay.
😰
No one to turn to
Medical billing advocates cost $300/hour. Most Americans can't afford to fight back.
HOW IT WORKS

Three steps to fight back.

01
📋
Paste your bill
Any CPT code, charge, or full bill. No formatting needed. Takes 5 seconds.
02
🤖
AI analyzes it
We cross-reference fair market rates and spot every overcharge instantly.
03
⚡
Fight back
Get a verdict, exact dollar savings, and a step-by-step action plan.
SERVICES

Every tool you need. Free.

44 specialized tools to understand, fight, and reduce your medical bills — organized by what you need to do right now.

REAL RESULTS

What BillVeil finds.

Example analyses from real medical bills.

ER Visit — $4,200
SIGNIFICANTLY OVERCHARGED
Medicare rate: $420. Hospital charged 10x. Itemized bill showed 3 duplicate charges.
✓ Could recover $2,800–$3,600
MRI Brain — $3,800
SIGNIFICANTLY OVERCHARGED
Fair market rate: $320–$500. Facility used a 12x markup. No Surprises Act applies.
✓ Could recover $3,000+
Lisinopril 10mg — $89/mo
SIGNIFICANTLY OVERCHARGED
GoodRx generic: $4/mo. Cost Plus Drugs: $3/mo. Zero reason to pay $89.
✓ Save $85/month = $1,020/year
PATIENT STORIES

Real patients. Real savings.

Over $4.2 million saved by BillVeil users since launch.

★★★★★

"I disputed a $4,200 ER bill and got it reduced to $800. BillVeil wrote the dispute letter in 30 seconds. I was shocked it actually worked."

Dallas, TX
Saved $3,400

"My insurance denied my MRI claim saying it wasn't medically necessary. BillVeil found 3 legal reasons the denial was invalid. They reversed it in 2 weeks."

Claim approved — $3,800
★★★★★

"I was paying $89/month for Lisinopril. BillVeil showed me I could get the exact same pill for $4 at Cost Plus Drugs. That's over $1,000 a year."

Saves $1,020/year

PRIVACY & SECURITY

Your health data belongs to you.

We built BillVeil with privacy as the foundation — not an afterthought. Here's exactly how we handle your information.

🚫
Nothing stored
We do not log, save, or store anything you type into BillVeil. Every session is stateless — when you close the tab, the data is gone.
🔒
256-bit TLS encryption
All data travels between your browser and our servers over 256-bit TLS — the same standard used by banks and healthcare systems.
👤
No health record created
We never build a health profile. We don't know your name, diagnoses, or provider. A phone number for login is all we ever ask for.
🤖
AI processes, never learns from you
The AI model analyzes your bill in the moment. It does not retain your inputs, improve from your data, or share results with any third party.
📋
HIPAA-aware practices
While BillVeil is an informational tool rather than a covered entity, we follow HIPAA-aligned data minimization principles by design.
🛡️

Stop overpaying.
Start fighting back.

330 million Americans deserve to understand their medical bills. BillVeil exists because healthcare transparency should not be a luxury.

No signup · No credit card · Results in 30 seconds

BillVeil provides informational tools only and does not constitute medical, legal, or financial advice. Always consult a qualified professional. BillVeil does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, national origin, sex, disability, or age.
